reference: Hi, welcome to HealthcareMagic. Hi Jyothi, the report indicates that the largest cyst measures thirty-seven by thirty-one millimeters in the left ovary. The other follicles are of different sizes according to their duration. Even though many follicles develop, typically only one may ovulate or several at a time, which can interfere with fertilization. You can engage in sexual intercourse with your husband, and after a week, you need to follow up with an ultrasound. I hope I have answered your questions. Take care.
text: Hi, welcome to HealthCare Magic. Hi, Jyoti. The report indicates that the largest cyst measures 37 x 31 mm in the left ovary; the other follicles are of different sizes according to their duration. Even though many follicles develop, typically only one may ovulate or several at a time, which can interfere with fertilization. You can engage in sexual intercourse with your husband, and after a week you need to follow up with an ultrasound. I hope I have answered your questions; take care.
